text: There once was a boy named Tommy. One day his mother baked some chocolate chip cookies. Tommy begged his mom to give him one every evening. After a while he decided to make his own. He made a few batches. One day he took them to school. Kids loved them. He saved his best batch for midnight snacks later. One night he didn’t feel well. He decided to eat cookies anyway. Somewhere on a hill lived an owl. He watched Tommy eat all his cookies. Maybe he knew something about feeling well again? The owl hooted softly. Tommy didn’t feel better. The owl didn’t speak. The boy put his head down. He woke early. Had enough cookies. Slept on the hill.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
